features: 💕【French Style Design】Basic French white fingertips with a popular is your daily stylish choice. You'll look so sweet, cute and elegant wearing it. Perfect for dates, birthday parties and Valentine's Day.

💕【Sturdy & Durable】Short press on nails are made of quality acrylic, which are environmental protection, non-toxic, no smell, and gentle to your nails and skin. The nails with moderate thickness are not easy to break, will not hurt nails and the human body. Your fingernails feel no burden to wear our acrylic fake nails and look in the most natural looking fit.

💕【Exquisite Design】Embellished with different patterns, different themes exquisite nails for you to choose. Fake nails stick on nails, it's charming and shiny, helping you to express confidence in your daily life and work, meanwhile, enhancing your temperament. You can be different every day.

💕【Easy to Use】Just gently polish your nails, file the sides and cuticle area with a nail file for an accurate fit and clean the dust. Apply glue on the nail, then select the right size of press on nails for each nail, put on the false nails and press on them for 25s.Then you will get a nature and beautiful manicure.
💕【Widely Application】Ideal for professional nail salons and beginners. Our short false nails are suitable for weddings, parties, dates, Halloween, Christmas and proms.
description: Product description Package Contents: 1. 24Pcs false nails. 2. 1 Small stick of glue. How to Use? 1. Remove the cuticle with nail tool. 2. Clear nails and keep the nails dry. 3. Apply glue on fake nails. 4. Press on and hold for 10 seconds. 5. Finish. How to Remove? 1. Immerse your hands in warm water for 2 minutes and use a wooden stick to cock out the slit from the side, then gently peel it off directly with your hands. 2. Remove the adhesive tape sticker and keep the fake nail tip. 3. Enjoy your unique and perfect manicure. Directions Remove the cuticle with nail tool. Clear nails and keep the nails dry. Apply glue on fake nails. Press on and hold for 10 seconds. Immerse your hands in warm water for 2 minutes and use a wooden stick to cock out the slit from the side, then gently peel it off directly with your hands. Remove the adhesive tape sticker and keep the fake nail tip. Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. See more
